authority: PI full-autonomy grant (amendment df6fcf1f); all parameters below are RESEARCHER-DEFINED, doctrine-grounded, and never attributed to Garrido; risk family is Garrido-native R24 (contingent demand surge, thesis Table 6.7)

mechanism_frozen.carrier: R24_product_composition ONLY (R14 yield deferred until this carrier is adjudicated, per the parent contract's sequencing)
mechanism_frozen.latent_state: sigma in {C_favored, H_favored}: a per-history composition state, persistent across campaigns with kappa_r; when an R24 surge fires, its quantity is assigned to the favored product with probability s_r (else the other product); observable ONLY through realized demand history
mechanism_frozen.r24_frequency: increased (uniform(1,336) h, the thesis's own increased level) so surges occur within 8-week campaigns

cells_frozen.adjacency: 2x3 lattice edges (kappa axis and s_r axis neighbors)
cells_frozen.control: s_r = 0.50 cell run at kappa_r 0.90 as instrument control (composition uninformative -> no reversal expected; a reversal there is an artifact flag)

arms_learner_blind.constants: 4 constant weekly-count postures (Discrete(4) held all campaign)
arms_learner_blind.observable: posterior-sigma posture: Beta-Bernoulli posterior on sigma from past campaigns' realized surge product assignments -> H_obs
arms_learner_blind.selection_forbidden: no learner return anywhere; M4 hybrid trains ONLY on GO

gates: as preregistered in the parent: H_PI_safe LCB95 >= 0.02, ranking reversal with >= 2 materially optimal actions (tol 0.005), H_obs LCB95 >= 0.015, connected >= 3 cells, worst_product_fill >= -0.02, lost increase forbidden, unresolved margin mean <= +2/campaign and max <= 12 (thesis SS6.5.4 Ut 12-31% anchor)

seeds.collision_scan: 759xxxx verified free across main repo + both worktrees (2026-07-22 scan; 758 burned by legacy artifacts)

execution.direct_simpy: required; risk masks break transducer exactness; evaluation is direct ProgramOFullDESSimulation with risks_enabled
self_checks_required: risk-off + coupling-off reproduces the stationary baseline for the same seed (regression guard)
surge product assignment matches sigma at rate s_r empirically (calibration probes)
CRN: risk/surge timeline identical across arms for same (cell, root)
determinism: same arm twice -> identical metrics
control cell shows no material reversal
execution.hosts: VPS free cores + local leftovers; hard cap per shard, abort-not-continue

verdicts: STOP_R24_PRODUCT_CARRIER_NO_CONVERTIBLE_HEADROOM or GO_LEARNER_ON_<cells>, exactly as the parent contract defines
